title: Distribution Manager Vacancy at IndiGo Cargo - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Distribution Manager Vacancy at IndiGo Cargo - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Join the IndiGo Cargo family as a Distribution Manager in Raipur. We believe in empowering our employees with the tools, training, and environment they need to succeed.

About IndiGo Cargo:
IndiGo Cargo is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage a fleet of vehicles and coordinate with drivers
• Coordinate with warehousing teams for inbound and outbound operations
• Manage reverse logistics and return merchandise authorization
• Handle customs clearance for import and export shipments
• Implement warehouse management systems (WMS) and track KPIs
• Optimize delivery routes to reduce cost and improve efficiency
• Implement cost-saving initiatives in transportation and warehousing

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in INCOTERMS
• Proficiency in Customs Clearance
• Proficiency in 3PL Management
• Proficiency in Data Analytics
• Proficiency in SAP SCM
• Proficiency in Supply Chain Management
• Proficiency in Inventory Management
• Proficiency in WMS

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Raipur, Chhattisgarh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with IndiGo Cargo!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
